text:
tive's first wife will be a trecherous woman and she will cheat her
husband and have sex relations with a man other than her husband. The native
will, therefore, abandon her and marry a second woman.
The disciple wants to know how the argument runs for the first wife's
bad character.
The Master answers:
*
The Sun is in libra. Its lord Venus is in Leo. The 7th Lord to Jupiter is
also Venus (Taurus) and in between the Sun and Venus there is Rahu the great
magician and Venu:: is caught between saturn in Cancer and Rahu in Virgo.
The native had, therefore, no happiness from the first wife.
The initial difficulty of having no peace of mind is caused by the
conjunction of Mercury with Jupiter both being inimical to each other.
This life will run on till about 46-47 when Jupiter in his fourth round
contacts Rahu.

296 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
CHART 448
Here as Jupiter is in Gemini with
Mars in Aries and the Moon in Cancer, Dh. Mars Jupt.
the native will have both brothers and
sisters.
Moori
